questions.question: Sarah has 12 apples. She gives 5 to her friend. How many apples does she have left?
A train travels at 60 miles per hour. How far will it travel in 3 hours?
Tom has 3 times as many marbles as Jerry. Jerry has 4 marbles. How many marbles does Tom have?
A pizza is cut into 8 slices. If 3 people eat 2 slices each, how many slices are left?
questions.hint: Calculate total eaten, then subtract from 8

questions.question: The sum of two numbers is 20. Their difference is 4. What are the numbers?
questions.hint: Let the numbers be a and b. a+b=20, a-b=4

questions.question: A rectangle has a length of 8 cm and a width of 5 cm. What is its area?
If 5 workers can build a wall in 10 days, how many days would 2 workers take?
questions.hint: This is an inverse proportion problem

questions.question: A store offers 20% off on a $50 item. What is the sale price?
The average of three numbers is 15. Two numbers are 12 and 18. What is the third number?
questions.hint: Average × 3 = sum, then subtract known numbers

questions.question: A baker bakes 24 cookies and puts them into boxes of 6. How many boxes does she need?
questions.hint: Divide total cookies by cookies per box
